changes: Target SDK upgraded to Android 15 API Level 35 for better security, optimization, and Play Store compatibility.
Added a Featured Wallpapers Carousel at the top of the Wall Hub with peeking Material 3 mask animations.
Introduced a Home Screen Notification Badge and minimal dismissible Announcements bottom sheet.
Added a hamburger changelog bottom sheet that loads release notes from GitHub JSON.
Redesigned tap gestures with neutral, clean highlights on home buttons.
Modernized Rei header clock hooks for Android 11, 12, 13, 14, and 15.
Preserved existing header clock styles, custom image loading, custom text loading, margins, and centering options.
Fixed custom header clock showing in the wrong places and improved stock clock hiding.
Fixed navbar, toolbar, status bar overlap, and layout issues after SystemUI restart.
Refreshed the lockscreen clock customization UI while keeping all options available.
Fixed toolbar spacing after SystemUI restart
